provenance.notes: Formalizes house.pattern.md Layout Rules: 'Run structural storage furniture (shelving) as a continuous run against the back wall, not as individually spaced items... one long, unbroken shelf run spanning nearly the entire back wall.' Distinct from MOD-SHELF-WALL-RUN (the shop's shorter, clustered wall-stock module) -- this module's footprint is wide and singular by design; a citing LayoutFamily must not split it into segments (house.pattern.md's own Common Mistakes: 'Leaving the back-wall shelf run broken into disconnected segments').
